# BreachScope

> Open-source CLI and dashboard for detecting supply chain attacks, toolchain misconfigurations, and code vulnerabilities across your entire stack — before they become incidents.

BreachScope is a security scanner for developers and DevSecOps teams. It scans dependencies, audits source code, probes live third-party service APIs (Supabase, Vercel, GitHub, Stripe, etc.), and runs blackbox HTTP probes against your running app — all from a single CLI command.

## Key Links

- [Homepage](https://breachscoope.vercel.app)
- [Documentation](https://breachscoope.vercel.app/docs)
- [Full documentation for LLMs](https://breachscoope.vercel.app/llms-full.txt)

## Installation

```bash
npm install -g breachscope
```

## Core Commands

- `breachscope scan` — Full scan: dependencies, code, toolchain, blackbox
- `breachscope scan --ai` — AI-powered multi-agent scan with live API probing
- `breachscope scan --target dependency` — Dependency/supply-chain only
- `breachscope scan --target code` — Static code audit only
- `breachscope scan --target toolchain` — Toolchain misconfiguration only
- `breachscope scan --target blackbox --url https://yourapp.com` — Blackbox HTTP probe
- `breachscope scan --mode deep` — Deep recursive scan (basic | major | deep)
- `breachscope login` — Authenticate CLI with the dashboard (device flow)
- `breachscope audit` — Static code audit only
- `breachscope deps` — Dependency scan only
- `breachscope probe <url>` — Blackbox probe a URL
- `breachscope smoke <url>` — Smoke test a URL

## What It Detects

- Vulnerable dependencies (CVEs via OSV, npm advisories, OpenSSF Scorecard)
- Supply chain attacks (compromised packages, wildcard versions, missing integrity hashes)
- Hardcoded secrets in source code
- Supabase RLS misconfigurations and exposed anon keys
- Vercel preview environment secret leakage
- GitHub unprotected branches and overprivileged tokens
- CORS misconfigurations and missing security headers
- Exposed internal paths (/.env, /.git, /admin)
- Weak cryptography, SQL injection patterns, prototype pollution

## Supported Services (Live Probing)

Supabase, Firebase, Clerk, Auth0, Vercel, GitHub, AWS, Cloudflare, Stripe, SendGrid, Resend, Twilio, Neon, PlanetScale, Upstash, OpenAI, Anthropic, Pinecone, Sentry, Datadog

## Dashboard

The web dashboard at breachscoope.vercel.app provides scan history, per-finding detail views, API key management, and settings sync to the CLI. Authentication uses NextAuth v5 with credentials, GitHub OAuth, and Google OAuth.
